isolation: KVM via Cloud Hypervisor (also uses crosvm; per a third-party article, Kata Containers)
name: exe.dev
notes: Stopped VMs are not free: disk continues to meter at $0.08/GiB-month, and memory falls to a 'disk rate' under usage pricing.
price_headline: $0.05 per CPU core-hour (usage pricing); $20/month Personal pool plan
pricing_model: Two models: Pool (flat monthly bundle of CPU/RAM/disk/transfer) and Usage (per-second, billed on active CPU + active memory; idle drops to disk-only)
summary: exe.dev provides persistent Linux virtual machines designed to be controlled programmatically by AI agents and developer tools. Each sandbox is a full Linux box with root access, systemd, a public hostname, a persistent disk, and SSH, accessed via 'ssh exe.dev new' or an HTTPS API. The product is marketed toward AI coding agents that need real isolated compute environments.
